full_text:
Liu Qi 劉琦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Qi (劉琦)was born in Shanyang. Eldest son of Liu Biao and legitimate heir of Jing. Became close friends with Liu Bei. Liu Qi was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom. Liu Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
